item.text: I’ll use the email tools only for this task, then create the appropriate draft or workflow action with cited evidence from the tool facts.
I’m going to read the thread first, then pull only the CRM and policy context needed to decide whether to draft, escalate, or take another supported action.
The request is a refund for a Pro plan bought on 2026-05-31 and requested on 2026-07-15. I’m checking the customer/account record and the refund policy before taking action.
The policy is clear: this is outside the 30-day refund window and the CRM marks the requester as standard tier, so I’m creating a safe draft reply rather than sending it directly.

arguments.body:
Hi Maya,

Thanks for reaching out. I checked the purchase date for Acme Health’s Pro plan and the refund policy. Because the plan was purchased on May 31, 2026 and the refund request came in on July 15, 2026, the request falls outside our 30-day refund window.

For standard-tier customers, refunds are not available after 30 days, so we’re not able to process a refund to the original card for this purchase.

Best,
Support

Hi Maya,

For standard-tier customers, refunds are not available after 30 days, so we’re not able to process a refund to the original card for this purchase.

Best,
Support

item.text:
Created the draft for `support_001`.

Action taken: refund denial draft, based on the Pro purchase date, request date, standard customer tier, and refund policy requiring requests within 30 days.
